summary: Morocco uses 8-digit tariff codes based on Harmonized System. Official tariff information maintained by Moroccan Ministry of Finance and Customs Authority.

data_availability.official_source: Moroccan Ministry of Finance / Customs Authority

sources.name: Morocco Tariff Schedule - World Bank WITS
sources.description: World Bank's tariff database with Moroccan schedules

sources.name: WTO - Morocco Tariff Profile
sources.description: WTO member tariff information for Morocco

regional_alignment.bloc: UEMOA (Union Economique et Monétaire Ouest Africaine) potential alignment
regional_alignment.note: Morocco is part of African Union and various regional trade agreements

next_steps: Access World Bank WITS for Moroccan tariff schedules
Contact Moroccan Ministry of Finance for official tariff database
Search for Moroccan Customs Authority (CNDI) official publications
Consult third-party trade databases for Moroccan tariff information
notes: Unlike South Africa, Nigeria, and Kenya, Morocco does not have an easily accessible public tariff download portal identified during research. Data is available through World Bank WITS but not directly from official Moroccan government sources online. May require direct contact with Moroccan customs authority for comprehensive tariff schedule.
